critical.mandate: This is a validation check — do NOT modify story status or sprint-status.yaml
Report results by appending a DoD Check Report section to the story file
Use glob {story_key}-*.md to find the story file

step.title: Load Story
step.ask: Which story to check? (provide story key, e.g., E1-S1)
step.action: Find and read the story file matching {story_key}-*.md in {implementation_artifacts}/
Verify story status is 'in-progress' or 'review' — HALT if story is in backlog, validating, ready-for-dev, or done

step.title: Check Implicit DoD Criteria
step.action: Check: All acceptance criteria are marked complete (- [x]) in the "Acceptance Criteria" section. Count total vs checked.
Check: All tasks and subtasks are marked complete (- [x]) in the "Tasks / Subtasks" section. Count total vs checked.
Check: Test Scenarios table is populated (at least one non-placeholder row)
Check: Dev Agent Record section has content (agent, files changed list populated)

step.title: Check Explicit DoD Items
step.action: Read the "Definition of Done" section of the story file
For each checkbox item: record whether it is checked (- [x]) or unchecked (- [ ])
If the DoD section only contains the template placeholder "Define all the Definition of Done" — report WARNING: DoD items were never defined for this story

step.title: Generate DoD Check Report
step.action: Determine overall verdict: PASS (all implicit + explicit items checked) or FAIL (any unchecked)
Append DoD Check Report at the END of the story file, after a horizontal rule (---) separator
step.template-output:
Append a section titled "## DoD Check Report" at the very end of the story file, preceded by a --- separator. Include: - Date of check - Overall verdict: PASS or FAIL - Implicit criteria results table:
| Criterion | Status | Details | |-----------|--------|---------| | Acceptance Criteria | n/m checked | list unchecked if any | | Subtasks | n/m checked | list unchecked if any | | Test Scenarios | populated/empty | — | | Dev Agent Record | populated/empty | — |
- Explicit DoD items results table:
| # | Item | Status | |---|------|--------| | 1 | {item text} | PASS/FAIL |
- If FAIL: list all unchecked items and recommend actions - If PASS: confirm story is ready for review gate (/kratos-run-all-reviews)

next-step.on_fail: /kratos-dev-story — Resume implementation to address unchecked DoD items
